code:
%% Circuit Breaker Pattern - Fault Tolerance %% Version: 1.0.0 %% Date: 2025-10-27 %% Description: Circuit breaker pattern for webhook delivery and external service calls stateDiagram-v2 [Retail_CustomerLoyalty] --> Closed: Initial State Closed --> Open: Failure Threshold Exceeded
(Retail_Inventory) Closed --> Closed: Successful Request
(Retail_OrderManagement) Closed --> Closed: Failed Request
(Retail_OrderManagement) Open --> HalfOpen: Timeout Elapsed
(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) Open --> Open: Request Attempted
(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) HalfOpen --> Closed: Test Request Successful
(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) HalfOpen --> Open: Test Request Failed
(Retail_OrderManagement) HalfOpen --> HalfOpen: Waiting for Test
(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) note right of Closed CLOSED STATE - All requests flow through - Monitor failure rate - Track response times - Increment error counter end note note right of Open OPEN STATE - Block all requests - Return cached response - Or return error immediately - Wait for timeout period - Log all blocked attempts end note note right of HalfOpen HALF-OPEN STATE - Allow test requests - Limited throughput - Monitor success rate - Quick transition decision end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为零售客户忠诚度系统（Retail_CustomerLoyalty）设计一个熔断器模式，用来保护对外部库存服务（Retail_Inventory）和订单管理服务（Retail_OrderManagement）的调用。核心要有三个状态：Closed、Open和HalfOpen。
明白，我理解为这是一个状态机图。系统初始状态应该是Closed，对吧？然后当对Retail_Inventory的失败次数超过阈值时，就跳转到Open状态？
对的。另外，在Closed状态下，无论是对Retail_OrderManagement的成功请求还是失败请求，都要记录并保持在Closed状态，只是内部计数器会变化。
那Open状态的自愈机制呢？我设想是当超时时间到了之后，由Retail_CustomerLoyalty触发进入HalfOpen状态，去尝试恢复。
没错，HalfOpen是关键。这时候只允许有限的测试请求通过。如果测试成功，就回到Closed；如果失败，就重新打开。还有，等待测试期间要保持在HalfOpen。
好的，我已经把三个状态的主流转画好了。现在我在每个状态右侧加上详细的行为说明注释，比如Closed状态要说明监控失败率、跟踪响应时间、递增错误计数器这些职责。
Open状态的注释需要强调一下：要阻塞所有请求，可以返回缓存响应或直接报错，还要记录所有被阻塞的尝试。HalfOpen则是限制吞吐量、快速决策。
已完成。三个状态的注释都补全了：Closed负责全流量通过和监控，Open负责熔断保护和日志记录，HalfOpen负责有限测试和快速状态决策。整个熔断器模式现在可以保护Retail_CustomerLoyalty对下游服务的调用了。
